title: ALP per-family pin-mux capability table (metadata/pinmux/<family>.yaml) v1
description: Structured, queryable projection of a SoM family's pin-mux: each E1M edge pad maps to the silicon function/peripheral that backs it and the on-module silicon that owns it.  GENERATED from metadata/e1m_modules/<family>/*.tsv by scripts/gen_pinmux_capability.py and gated byte-in-sync (the TSVs remain the single source).  A CLI/IDE queries this table instead of parsing the heterogeneous raw TSVs.  Pad exclusivity (no silicon pad backing two E1M functions) is enforced separately by scripts/check_pin_conflicts.py.

silicon_peripheral.description: Silicon peripheral/function backing the pad.  Empty when the pad is plain GPIO (no dedicated peripheral mux) -- faithful to the source TSV's empty cell.
